# `@pagesmith/site`

> Pagesmith site toolkit on top of `@pagesmith/core`.

- Canonical CLI: `pagesmith-site` (`pagesmith` remains a compatibility alias, and is also the umbrella name for `pagesmith skills install`)
- Skills install: `npx pagesmith skills install` writes versioned-pointer skill stubs from every resolvable `@pagesmith/*` package into `.agents/skills/` plus harness mirrors; `--check` verifies without writing (CI). `pagesmith-core skills` is a deprecated alias for the same installer.
- Default preset fallback: `@pagesmith/site/preset`
- JSX runtime: `@pagesmith/site/jsx-runtime`
- CSS bundles: `@pagesmith/site/css/*`
- Runtime JS: `@pagesmith/site/runtime/*`
- Vite SSG: `@pagesmith/site/vite` — `pagesmithSsg({ beforeBuild })` runs a project hook once before SSR/prerender; route rendering and `prerenderRoutes()` use the shared `mapWithConcurrency` pool (`concurrency` option, default: host parallelism)
- Shared helpers: `@pagesmith/site/ssg-utils` — `generateFeed(entries, config)` (RSS 2.0), `generateSitemap(routes, config)` (also used internally by `@pagesmith/docs`), `runPagefindIndexing`
- Build validation: `@pagesmith/site/build-validator` — `checkSitemap` and `checkBundledAssets` opt-in checks alongside the existing structural checks
- SEO: `seo.jsonLd` (default `true`) emits schema.org JSON-LD (`Article`/`BlogPosting` + `WebSite`) from `SiteDocument`; also exported standalone as `buildArticleStructuredData`, `buildWebsiteStructuredData`, `serializeJsonLd`
- Config helpers: `defineSiteConfig`, `loadSiteConfig`, `parseSiteConfig`, `normalizeBasePath`, `withBasePath`, `stripBasePath`, `formatPath`, `normalizeOrigin`
- URL strategy: `trailingSlash` config option (default: `false`); `formatPath()` replaces `withTrailingSlash()`
- Schemas: `@pagesmith/site/schemas` exports `SiteUserConfigSchema`, `SitePageMeta` plus the core schemas
- Components: `HeroSection`, `ActionButtons`, `ContentMeta`, `SiteFooter` (with `extraContent` slot)
- Layouts: `HomeLayout`, `ListingLayout`, `NotFoundLayout`
- SEO: `SitePageMeta` with `ogType`, `publishedTime`, `modifiedTime`, `author`, `tags`; Twitter Card and article meta tags
- Framework-hosted apps can use just `@pagesmith/site/css/content` and `@pagesmith/site/runtime/content`
- Theme-aware images: `.ps-figure`/`.ps-figure-themed`/`.ps-figure-zoomable` on pipeline-generated figures, `.only-light`/`.only-dark` on `<img>`, `.show-on-light`/`.show-on-dark` on any element, `.invert-on-dark` for single-variant inversion
- Themed images runtime: `initThemedImages()` in chrome runtime for JS-enhanced theme switching
- Image-zoom runtime: `initImageZoom()` in `@pagesmith/site/runtime/image-zoom` (also in content + standalone bundles) reveals the per-figure expand button and opens a singleton full-viewport modal (Ctrl/Cmd+wheel zoom, +/- step, 50%–400% raster / 50%–1000% SVG, theme-aware src swap)

Read first:

- `node_modules/@pagesmith/site/skills/pagesmith-site-setup/references/setup-site.md`
- `node_modules/@pagesmith/site/skills/pagesmith-site-setup/references/usage.md`
- `node_modules/@pagesmith/site/README.md`
- `node_modules/@pagesmith/site/REFERENCE.md`
- `node_modules/@pagesmith/site/skills/pagesmith-site-setup/references/site-guidelines.md`
- `node_modules/@pagesmith/core/REFERENCE.md`
